name: Logs Have Been Deleted / Disabled or Stopped
notes: This rule triggers when logs are being deleted, disabled or stopped.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event matches (CATEGORYNAME(category) == 'Disable Logging Attempted' OR CATEGORYNAME(category) == 'Disable Logging Succeeded') OR QID == 88750314 AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Logs Have Been Deleted / Disabled or Stopped on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event matches (CATEGORYNAME(category) == 'Disable Logging Attempted' OR CATEGORYNAME(category) == 'Disable Logging Succeeded') OR QID == 88750314 AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Logs Have Been Deleted / Disabled or Stopped
Event description: Detects when logs are being deleted, disabled or stopped.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
